nodes.label: Joiarib
nodes.description: The founder of one of the courses of the priests (Neh. 11:10).

verses.text: And of the priests; Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,
Of the priests: Jedaiah the son of Joiarib, Jachin.
And of Joiarib, Mattenai; of Jedaiah, Uzzi;
